name: Cajun Chicken Sandwiches
recipeIngredient: 4 chicken breast halves without skin, boneless
Emeril's Bayou Blast (see recipe) -- to taste
recipeInstructions:
1. Season the chicken breast halves with Emeril's Bayou Blast and powdered chipotle peppers to taste.
2. Heat the oil in a skillet over medium heat until hot.
3. Place the seasoned chicken in the skillet and cook, turning once or twice, until fully cooked. Transfer the chicken to a plate lined with paper towels to drain excess oil.
4. Spread a thin layer of chipotle pepper puree on one half of each hamburger bun.
5. Spread your choice of mustard or mayonnaise on the other half of each bun.
6. Place a piece of cooked chicken and any desired garnishes (such as tomatoes, pickles, onion slices, lettuce, and cheese) onto each bun.
7. Serve and enjoy the flavorful combination of spices and chipotle pepper puree.
